caption: A man with brown hair, wearing a dark blazer over a light-colored button-down shirt, stands behind a white podium in a studio or event space. The background is a light gray wall featuring repeating logos for "theCUBE" and "#BigDataSV 2015" alongside blue cubic icons. On the podium sits a white laptop adorned with a blue cube sticker and a clear water bottle. Throughout the sequence, the man is speaking and gesturing with his right hand. In the final frames, a blue information bar appears at the bottom of the screen, displaying the text "#theCUBE LIVE at #BigDataSV 2015" in large white letters, followed by smaller text that reads "Fairmont Hotel - Valley Room San Jose, CA". The man's expression and head position shift slightly as he talks, while the background and equipment remain stationary.
